allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 1000 -and $_.TimeCreated -ge \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-3\) } | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $_.Message }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$f = ""C:\\Windows\\System32\\vcruntime140_1.dll""; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $v = [System.Diagnostics.FileVersionInfo]::GetVersionInfo\($f\); Write-Output ""Found: $\($v.FileName\) v$\($v.FileVersion\)"" } else { Write-Output ""NOT FOUND in System32"" }')
